## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#abstract"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Abstract</span>

<span data-as="p">This SEP proposes improvements to enum schema
definitions in MCP, deprecating the non-standard `enumNames` property in
favor of JSON Schema-compliant patterns, and introducing additional
support for multi-select enum schemas in addition to single choice
schemas. The new schemas have been validated against the JSON
specification.</span> <span data-as="p">**Schema Changes:** <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/pull/1148"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/pull/1148</a>
Typescript SDK Changes: <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1077"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1077</a>
Python SDK Changes:
<a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/pull/1246"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/pull/1246</a>
**Client Implementation:**
<a href="https://github.com/evalstate/fast-agent/pull/324/files"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://github.com/evalstate/fast-agent/pull/324/files</a>
**Working Demo:**
<a href="https://asciinema.org/a/anBvJdqEmTjw0JkKYOooQa5Ta" class="link"
target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://asciinema.org/a/anBvJdqEmTjw0JkKYOooQa5Ta</a></span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#motivation"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Motivation</span>

<span data-as="p">The existing schema for enums uses a non-standard
approach to adding titles to enumerated values. It also limits use of
enums in Elicitation (and any other schema object that should adopt
`EnumSchema` in the future) to a single selection model. It is a common
pattern to ask the user to select multiple entries. In the UI, this
amounts to the difference between using checkboxes or radio
buttons.</span> <span data-as="p">For these reasons, we propose the
following non-breaking minor improvements to the `EnumSchema` for
improving user and developer experience.</span>

- Keep the existing `EnumSchema` as “Legacy”
  - It uses a non-standard approach for adding titles to enumerated
    values
  - Mark it as Legacy but still support it for now.
  - As per @dsp-ant When we have a proper deprecation strategy, we’ll
    mark it deprecated
- Introduce the distinction between Untitled and Titled enums.
  - If the enumerated values are sufficient, no separate title need be
    specified for each value.
  - If the enumerated values are not optimal for display, a title may be
    specified for each value.
- Introduce the distinction between Single and Multi-select enums.
  - If only one value can be selected, a Single select schema can be
    used
  - If more than one value can be selected, a Multi-select schema can be
    used
- In `ElicitResponse`, add array as an `additionalProperty` type
  - Allows multiple selection of enumerated values to be returned to the
    server

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#specification"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Specification</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#1-mark-current-enumschema-with-non-standard-enumnames-property-as-“legacy”"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">1. Mark Current `EnumSchema` with
Non-Standard `enumNames` Property as “Legacy”</span>

<span data-as="p">The current MCP specification uses a non-standard
`enumNames` property for providing display names for enum values. We
propose to mark `enumNames` property as legacy, suggest using
`TitledSingleSelectEnum`, a standards compliant enum type we define
below.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="13" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// Continue to support the current EnumSchema as Legacy

/**
 * Legacy: Use TitledSingleSelectEnumSchema instead.
 * This interface will be removed in a future version.
 */
export interface LegacyEnumSchema {
  type: "string";
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
  enum: string[];
  enumNames?: string[]; // Titles for enum values (non-standard, legacy)
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#2-define-single-selection-enums-with-titled-and-untitled-varieties"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">2. Define Single Selection Enums (with
Titled and Untitled varieties)</span>

<span data-as="p">Enums may or may not need titles. The enumerated
values may be human readable and fine for display. In which case an
untitled implementation using the JSON Schema keyword `enum` is simpler.
Adding titles requires the `enum` array to be replaced with an array of
objects using `const` and `title`.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="23" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// Single select enum without titles
export type UntitledSingleSelectEnumSchema = {
  type: "string";
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
  enum: string[]; // Plain enum without titles
};

// Single select enum with titles
export type TitledSingleSelectEnumSchema = {
  type: "string";
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
  oneOf: Array<{
    const: string; // Enum value
    title: string; // Display name for enum value
  }>;
};

// Combined single selection enumeration
export type SingleSelectEnumSchema =
  | UntitledSingleSelectEnumSchema
  | TitledSingleSelectEnumSchema;
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#3-introduce-multiple-selection-enums-with-titled-and-untitled-varieties"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">3. Introduce Multiple Selection Enums (with
Titled and Untitled varieties)</span>

<span data-as="p">While elicitation does not support arbitrary JSON
types like arrays and objects so clients can display the selection
choice easily, multiple selection enumerations can be easily
implemented.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="32" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// Multiple select enums without titles
export type UntitledMultiSelectEnumSchema = {
  type: "array";
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
  minItems?: number; // Minimum number of items to choose
  maxItems?: number; // Maximum number of items to choose
  items: {
    type: "string";
    enum: string[]; // Plain enum without titles
  };
};

// Multiple select enums with titles
export type TitledMultiSelectEnumSchema = {
  type: "array";
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
  minItems?: number; // Minimum number of items to choose
  maxItems?: number; // Maximum number of items to choose
  items: {
    oneOf: Array<{
      const: string; // Enum value
      title: string; // Display name for enum value
    }>;
  };
};

// Combined Multiple select enumeration
export type MultiSelectEnumSchema =
  | UntitledMultiSelectEnumSchema
  | TitledMultiSelectEnumSchema;
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#4-combine-all-varieties-as-enumschema"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">4. Combine All Varieties as
`EnumSchema`</span>

<span data-as="p">The final `EnumSchema` rolls up the legacy,
multi-select, and single-select schemas as one, defined as:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="5" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// Combined legacy, multiple, and single select enumeration
export type EnumSchema =
  | SingleSelectEnumSchema
  | MultiSelectEnumSchema
  | LegacyEnumSchema;
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#5-extend-elicitresult"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">5. Extend ElicitResult</span>

<span data-as="p">The current elicitation result schema only allows
returning primitive types. We extend this to include string arrays for
MultiSelectEnums:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="4" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
export interface ElicitResult extends Result {
  action: "accept" | "decline" | "cancel";
  content?: { [key: string]: string | number | boolean | string[] }; // string[] is new
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#instance-schema-examples"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Instance Schema Examples</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a

``` shiki

  "type": "string",
  "title": "Color Selection",
  "description": "Choose your favorite color",
  "oneOf": [

    { "const": "#00FF00", "title": "Green" },
    { "const": "#0000FF", "title": "Blue" }
  ],
  "default": "#00FF00"
}
```

{
  "type": "array",
  "title": "Color Selection",
  "description": "Choose your favorite colors",
  "minItems": 1,

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#rationale"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Rationale</span>

1.  **Standards Compliance**: Aligns with official JSON Schema
    specification. Standard patterns work with existing JSON Schema
    validators
2.  **Flexibility**: Supports both plain enums and enums with display
    names for single and multiple choice enums.
3.  **Client Implementation:** shows that the additional overhead of
    implementing a group of checkboxes v/s a single checkbox is minimal:
    <a href="https://github.com/evalstate/fast-agent/pull/324/files"
    class="link" target="_blank"
    rel="noreferrer">https://github.com/evalstate/fast-agent/pull/324/files</a>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#backwards-compatibility"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Backwards Compatibility</span>

<span data-as="p">The `LegacyEnumSchema` type maintains backwards
compatible during the migration period. Existing implementations using
`enumNames` will continue to work until a protocol-wide deprecation
strategy is implemented, and this schema is removed.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#reference-implementation"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Reference Implementation</span>

<span data-as="p">**Schema Changes:** <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/pull/1148"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/pull/1148</a>
Typescript SDK Changes: <a
href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1077"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1077</a>
Python SDK Changes:
<a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/pull/1246"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/pull/1246</a>
**Client Implementation:**
<a href="https://github.com/evalstate/fast-agent/pull/324/files"
class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://github.com/evalstate/fast-agent/pull/324/files</a>
**Working Demo:**
<a href="https://asciinema.org/a/anBvJdqEmTjw0JkKYOooQa5Ta" class="link"
target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://asciinema.org/a/anBvJdqEmTjw0JkKYOooQa5Ta</a></span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#security-considerations"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Security Considerations</span>

<span data-as="p">No security implications identified. This change is
purely about schema structure and standards compliance.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#appendix"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Appendix</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#validations"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Validations</span>

<span data-as="p">Using stored validations in the JSON Schema Validator
at <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/" class="link"
target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/</a> we
validate:</span>

- All of the example instance schemas from this document against the
  proposed JSON meta-schema `EnumSchema` in the next section.
- Valid and invalid values against the example instance schemas from
  this document.

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#legacy-single-selection"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Legacy Single Selection</span>

- `EnumSchema` validating a
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/lsK7Bn0C" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">legacy single select instance schema
  with titles</a>
- The legacy titled single select instance schema validating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/GSk7rnRe" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">a correct single selection</a>
- The legacy titled single select instance schema validating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/3kYvxsVP" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">an incorrect single selection</a>

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#single-selection"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Single Selection</span>

- `EnumSchema` validating a
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/MBlHW5IQ" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">single select instance schema without
  titles</a>
- `EnumSchema` validating a
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/s38xt4JV" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">single select instance schema with
  titles</a>
- The untitled single select instance schema validating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/M0hkYoeG" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">a correct single selection</a>
- The untitled single select instance schema invalidating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/3Try4BCt" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">an incorrect single selection</a>
- The titled single select instance schema validating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/4oDbv9yt" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">a correct single selection</a>
- The titled single select instance schema invalidating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/A2KlNzLH" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">an incorrect single selection</a>

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#multiple-selection"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Multiple Selection</span>

- `EnumSchema` validating the
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/4uc3Ndsq" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">multi-select instance schema without
  titles</a>
- `EnumSchema` validating the
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/TmkIqqXI" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">multi-select instance schema with
  titles</a>
- The untitled multi-select instance schema validating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/IE8Bkvtg" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">a correct multiple selection</a> The
  untitled multi-select instance schema validating invalidating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/8tlqjUgW" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">an incorrect multiple selection</a>
  The titled multi-select instance schema validating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/Nb1Rw1qa" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">a correct multiple selection</a> The
  titled multi-select instance schema validating invalidating
  <a href="https://www.jsonschemavalidator.net/s/MRfyqrVC" class="link"
  target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">an incorrect multiple selection</a>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="1330-elicitation-enum-schema-improvements-and-standards.html#json-meta-schema"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">JSON meta-schema</span>

<span data-as="p">This is our proposal for the replacement of the
current `EnumSchema` in the specification’s `schema.json`.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="130" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema",
  "definitions": {
    // New Definitions Follow
    "UntitledSingleSelectEnumSchema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "type": { "const": "string" },
        "title": { "type": "string" },
        "description": { "type": "string" },
        "enum": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": { "type": "string" },
          "minItems": 1
        }
      },
      "required": ["type", "enum"],
      "additionalProperties": false
    },

    "UntitledMultiSelectEnumSchema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "type": { "const": "array" },
        "title": { "type": "string" },
        "description": { "type": "string" },
        "minItems": {
          "type": "number",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "maxItems": {
          "type": "number",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "items": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "type": { "const": "string" },
            "enum": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": { "type": "string" },
              "minItems": 1
            }
          },
          "required": ["type", "enum"],
          "additionalProperties": false
        }
      },
      "required": ["type", "items"],
      "additionalProperties": false
    },

    "TitledSingleSelectEnumSchema": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": ["type", "anyOf"],
      "properties": {
        "type": { "const": "string" },
        "title": { "type": "string" },
        "description": { "type": "string" },
        "anyOf": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "required": ["const", "title"],
            "properties": {
              "const": { "type": "string" },
              "title": { "type": "string" }
            },
            "additionalProperties": false
          }
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },

    "TitledMultiSelectEnumSchema": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": ["type", "anyOf"],
      "properties": {
        "type": { "const": "array" },
        "title": { "type": "string" },
        "description": { "type": "string" },
        "anyOf": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "required": ["const", "title"],
            "properties": {
              "const": { "type": "string" },
              "title": { "type": "string" }
            },
            "additionalProperties": false
          }
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },

    "LegacyEnumSchema": {
      "properties": {
        "type": {
          "type": "string",
          "const": "string"
        },
        "title": { "type": "string" },
        "description": { "type": "string" },
        "enum": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": { "type": "string" }
        },
        "enumNames": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": { "type": "string" }
        }
      },
      "required": ["enum", "type"],
      "type": "object"
    },

    "EnumSchema": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "$ref": "#/definitions/UntitledSingleSelectEnumSchema" },
        { "$ref": "#/definitions/UntitledMultiSelectEnumSchema" },
        { "$ref": "#/definitions/TitledSingleSelectEnumSchema" },
        { "$ref": "#/definitions/TitledMultiSelectEnumSchema" },
        { "$ref": "#/definitions/LegacyEnumSchema" }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>
